tests.test_name: Gap Analysis sections do not appear when add-on is not selected
tests.description: Verifies that Coverage Gaps and Robustness Gaps sections are hidden from the output when the Gap Analysis add-on has not been selected.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: The base documentation result is shown after analyzing the uploaded test file

test_coverage.verification_step: Coverage Gaps is absent from output
test_coverage.what_it_checks: No Coverage Gaps section is displayed when the add-on is not active

test_coverage.verification_step: Robustness Gaps is absent from output
test_coverage.what_it_checks: No Robustness Gaps section is displayed when the add-on is not active
